title: MYOB integration
excerpt:
Hi Monday community, 
Does an application exist for integration of MYOB into Monday.com? 
Cheers, 
Justin

posts.author: JustinB1994 (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday community,

Does an application exist for integration of MYOB into Monday.com?

Cheers,

Justin

posts.author: Sam1 (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also interested in this any news?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JustinB1994, @Sam1

We are in final testing of a custom MYOB integration for creating POs using monday data.

Here’s the basics of what the integration does

On button click…

  • Validate Supplier & Cost account
  • Validate/Update/Create Item
  • Create PO & PDF
  • Upload PDF to monday
  • Update monday with PO & Item details
  • Log tracking data during processing

Final step will be to automatically send PO to supplier.

Jim - The Monday Man
Column Magic - the magical columns toolbox app
We Create Custom Solutions

posts.author: JustinB1994 (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Awesome! Thanks Jim

Is there an ETA for release?

Cheers,

Justin

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JustinB1994

There are currently no plans for a generic app at this point. That might change depending on interest.

But for the time being, we are only offering “semi-custom” MYOB integrations which would include components of what we have previously created and build on our existing experience.

Having become a MYOB partner, creating the authorization processes and the experience we’ve gained working with the MYOB API details will significantly reduce the time required for future integrations and installations.

If you would like to discuss further what a “semi-custom” implementation might look like, you can contact me directly here Contact – The Monday Man.

Jim - The Monday Man
Column Magic - the magical columns toolbox app

posts.cookedHtml: i would also love to see an MYOB Integration with Monday

posts.author: JustinB1994 (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you have an update on this integration yet Jim, thank you.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JustinB1994

We currently do not have any plans to create a marketplace app for integrating monday with MYOB. We will have bandwidth to resume semi-custom work in 2024.

Jim - The Monday Man
